admConfigEndpointNotReady: Admin config endpoint is not ready
admNewPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least 4 characters.
admPasswordsHashedHint: Passwords are hashed server-side. Saving the config does not change them.
admSignupHint: Let people create their own account with an email/password, gated by domain, email confirmation, and an anti-spam challenge.
admSignupAllowedDomainsPlaceholder: one domain per line, e.g. example.com or *.example.com
admSignupAllowedDomainsHint: Subdomains are matched too (mail.example.com matches example.com). Use * as a wildcard for more control: "*.example.com" matches only subdomains (not example.com itself), "*.edu" matches any .edu domain. Empty list = nobody can sign up.
admSignupPublicBaseUrlHint: Leave empty to use the request's own host. Set this if the backend sits behind a reverse proxy.
admEmailHint: Send signup verification emails through Resend's API — just an API key, no host/port/TLS to configure, and it isn't affected by networks that block outbound SMTP ports. Leave the API key unset and the SMTP settings below are used as a fallback instead.
admResendApiKeyHint: From the Resend dashboard, under API Keys.
admResendFromAddressHint: Must be on a domain verified in your Resend dashboard.
admSmtpHint: Only used if Resend above isn't configured. Leave the host empty to log verification links to the server console instead (useful for local testing).
admGeoHint: Restrict signup and account login to specific IP ranges and/or countries or cities (e.g. a campus network, or "only Romania"). A caller is let through if it matches either an IP range or a region below.
admGeoModeWhitelistHint: Only callers matching a region or CIDR range below are allowed. Empty lists block everyone.
admGeoModeBlacklistHint: Callers matching a region or CIDR range below are blocked; everyone else is allowed. Empty lists block no one.
admGeoMmdbPathHint: Path to a GeoLite2-City.mmdb file (MaxMind's own download, or a redistributed mirror of it both work). Required for the country/city list below to actually be enforced — without it, only the CIDR list below is enforced.
admGeoCityOptionalPlaceholder: leave empty to allow the whole country
admGeoNoCitiesKnown: No cities known for this country
admGeoDataAttribution: City data © GeoNames.org, licensed under CC BY 4.0
admGeoMoreCitiesHint: +{n} more — keep typing to narrow it down
admGeoCidrsHint: One CIDR range per line, e.g. 193.226.0.0/16. Enabling this with an empty list and no regions blocks everyone.
admGeoTrustForwardedFor: Trust the X-Forwarded-For header (only if behind a reverse proxy that sets it)
admUsersHint: Local self-signup accounts. Admins can add a pre-verified account directly, bypassing the domain check and email confirmation.
admMacrosHint: Macros known to the printer right now — check the ones guests are allowed to run.
admMacrosEmpty: No macros found on the printer.
admFontDetectHint: Automatically detected fonts installed on your device — pick one most visitors are also likely to have, or upload a font file to guarantee it renders for everyone.
admFontUploadLabel: Custom font file (OTF / TTF / WOFF / WOFF2)
admFontNoCustom: No custom font uploaded — using system font
admBrandingLangHint: Upload a variant per language, or leave only a Default image/text to use everywhere.
admFooterLinksHint: Icons shown at the bottom of every page (GitHub, institution links, etc). Order controls display order.
admFooterLinksEmpty: No footer links configured. Add one below.
admGroupsHint: Anonymous, Guest, and Admin are built in and always present. Custom groups are assigned to signed-up accounts via the email list below, or manually from the Users tab.
admGroupsEmpty: No custom groups defined. Add one below.
admGroupEmailsPlaceholder: one email per line, e.g. student@university.edu
admGroupEmailsHint: Anyone who signs up with one of these emails lands in this group instead of the default — edit this list any time.
admGroupPowerDevicesHint: Give this group its own label for each device, and choose which ones it can see or switch.
